word: H1037 - בֵּית מִלֹּוא - Bêyth Millôwʼ - bayth mil-lo' - House of Millo

sections.paragraph:
Original: בּית מלּא בּית מלּוא

Transliteration: bêyth millô' bêyth millô'

Phonetic: bayth mil-lo'

BDB Definition:

Beth-millo = "house of Millo" or " house of the rampart"
  1. a place near Shechem, site unknown
  2. a citadel in Jerusalem

Origin: from H1004 and H4407

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
